invariant: STEP 0.0 Case B (R-MW-5, D29) — master + exactly 1 pending → auto-checkout that branch. Skipping means orchestrator runs on master for a single-pending case instead of checking out the correct branch.
owning_role: prompts/_orchestrator.md STEP 0.0 Case B — git checkout <branch> + emit 'Auto-checked out...'
seed: Apply defect: remove Case B auto-checkout logic (orchestrator on master + 1 pending proceeds without checkout or emit)
Expected: orchestrator proceeds on master without checking out feature/my-analytics; no emit message
load_bearing_assertion: Golden: Case B fires → git checkout feature/my-analytics → emit message → continue. Defect: master state unresolved; no checkout performed; orchestrator runs on master. Value-parity fails: auto_checkout_performed == false vs golden true.
expected_verdict: value-parity FAIL — no-auto-checkout: master state unresolved; pending stream branch not checked out
separates_from_golden_by: auto_checkout_performed flag + emit message presence. Golden: checkout message emitted. Defect: no checkout, no message — orchestrator runs on master.
